---
title: "Nostradamus datacube ![](images/NOSTRADAMUS_logo.png){width=150px style='vertical-align:middle; margin-left:10px;'}" 
---

A [**dedicated cube in a box**](https://git.unepgrid.ch/NOSTRADAMUS/cube-in-a-box-jupyter){target="_blank"} has been deployed for the **Nostradamus** project. It is a **modifed clone** from the [original cube in a box](https://github.com/opendatacube/cube-in-a-box){target="_blank"}.

The following **modifications** have been done on the original cube in a box to become the Nostradamus data cube:

-   Default [**Jupyter notebook**](jupyter.qmd#jupyter-notebook){#jupyter-notebook}{target="\_blank"} replaced by [**Jupyterlab**](jupyter.html#jupyterlab){#jupyterlab}{target="\_blank"}

-   "**sign_url"** function added to access data in «Planetary Computer»

-   Default source for [**Sentinel-2**](sentinel.qmd){target="_blank"} has been replaced by [**Planetary Computer**](planetary_computer.qmd){target="_blank"} as it was slow and unstable

-   The default **ESRI Land Cover source** in Planetary Computer (<https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/dataset/io-lulc)> that is deprecated has been replaced by <https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/dataset/io-lulc-annual-v02>

-   [**Landsat Collection 2 Level 2 Science Products**](landsat.qmd){target="_blank"} added

-   **Jupyter notebook** **modified or created** for each available Level2 science product (see [details](data_sources.qmd){target="_blank"})

-   **Datacube-explorer** added and modified to access Planetary Computer data

-   **DATETIME** added as make argument (allows to filter the time range of interest)
